item.title: Now Accepting Submissions for Autumn Rookery 2023!
item.author: invalid@example.com (lemonbear)
item.dc:creator: lemonbear
item.content:encoded:
We're now accepting submissions of any type for the Autumn 2023 issue of the Rookery!

These could include:
  • Project spotlights
  • OPINIONS
  • Community spotlights (for community members who have made a positive impact on the community)
  • COOL SHADERS, renders, fan art, anything creative!
  • Building/World Edit/Profession TUTORIALS
  • Real world inspiration
  • World-building guides (e.g, how jewelry was made in the 1400s)
  • Game of Thrones/ASOIAF/server-related JOKES
  • Free-form writing (long or short-form articles about anything related to the server)
If you have an idea for something, talk to a mod and we can help you get it finished!

The goal is to release the issue by the beginning of October, so try to get your submissions in as soon as possible! If you have an idea but think it might take a bit of time for you to finish it, just let us know and we'll leave a space for it!

Check out past Rookerys here!

item.title: The Rookery — Summer 2023
item.author: invalid@example.com (lemonbear)
item.dc:creator: lemonbear
item.content:encoded: (Image is the link)

item.title: Now Accepting Submissions for SUMMER 2023 Rookery!
item.author: invalid@example.com (CashBanks)
item.dc:creator: CashBanks
item.content:encoded:
We're now accepting submissions of any type for the Summer 2023 issue of the Rookery!

These could include:
  • Project spotlights
  • OPINIONS
  • Community spotlights (for community members who have made a positive impact on the community)
  • COOL SHADERS, renders, fan art, anything creative!
  • Building/World Edit/Profession TUTORIALS
  • Real world inspiration
  • World-building guides (e.g, how jewelry was made in the 1400s)
  • Game of Thrones/ASOIAF/server-related JOKES
  • Free-form writing (long or short-form articles about anything related to the server)
If you have an idea for something, talk to a mod and we can help you get it finished!

The goal is to release the issue by the end of June, so try to get your submissions in as soon as possible! If you have an idea but think it might take a bit of time for you to finish it, just let us know and we'll leave a space for it!

Check out past Rookerys here!
